user_bio: I’m Alex — I design n8n workflows for marketing and ops teams who care about deliverability and data quality. My templates combine the verify-email.app MCP and REST APIs with Slack, HubSpot, Sheets, and Airtable so you can validate leads, bulk-check lists, and get weekly intelligence reports. Everything is built to be copied, credentialed, and run in production, with clear setup notes in the canvas.
